reviews.review_description: The app no longer works and there is no developer support. I already tried to uninstall and reinstall, reached out to the developers support via Discord but no response. Feels like they gave up without notice. It is a shame because was enjoyable while worked.

reviews.review_title: Dont buy this app! Broken, and useless
reviews.review_description:
I don’t know what the problem is in developing a Meditation app. I thought the problem is more towards finding good speaker. But the virtual surroundings are in really bad quality. Even Gorilla Tag has nicer visuals. And if you would like to get rid of it and you’re choosing Mixed Reality, the app does nothing anymore and you’re left behind at the start surrounding and waiting there for hours. Maybe this is also a non guided meditation. 

I’m sorry but what is the crazy part of doing such an app? There are so many options to film REAL Environments in 360 3D these days. You film 10 minutes and let them loop with a breathing animation and that’s it. Because speakers you have and they are nice! But at this stage without any new update since 10 months I have to delete it because there will be never any new update I assume

Update 1: None of the MR sessions load. Selecting any causes the session screen to disappear leaving only the sunset environment that you appear in when you open the app. Then...nothing.

Update 2: Content of any kind no longer loads, the app complaining of no internet connection despite being connected.

Update 3: Well, it seems development and support have ceased. Such a shame. I can no longer recommend this app. Avoid this one, folks :(

---

YourHaven is a beautifully designed app. From the sounds to the visuals to the diverse selection of content, there's a lot here to enjoy. I hope it continues to grow. 

There are a couple of UX niggles that I hope the developers can address; however, the app's website and Discord seem dead so I hope someone sees this...

When starting the app, it always fails to detect my internet connection, even though I'm connected. It eventually resolves, but it happens every time.

Also, and again on startup, the app insists on me completing the introductory breathwork session before I can access other content, as if I was launching the app for the first time, every time.

I hope the app is still under development, or at least someone is keeping the lights on. It's an otherwise delightful experience.

I’m blown away by the quality of Your Haven. The graphics, environments and whole user experience is effortless. Exactly what you need for an app that will help you relax and calm you. I can highly recommend this if you’re looking to meditate in VR.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! Your recommendation means the world to us, and it's users like you who inspire us to keep innovating and improving our content. 

We're excited for you to experience the new features and environments we have in store. 

Thank you for being a part of our journey to redefine meditation and mental wellbeing in the digital age!  - Claire, CEO YourHaven 💜

reviews.review_description:
I just bought the app today and did a couple of sessions. The environments and narratives are soothing, and I think this is a really promising app!!

The reason I'm already writing a review now, and not waiting longer, is the following: when I'm meditating I would like to be able to choose wether I'm sitting on the ground, on a chair or standing. Right now it seems that the menu's in the app are on standing height? I cannot change these to 'sitting on the ground height'.  Also I noticed with the first flow (morning glow) that the breathing animation seems to be on 'ground sitting height' but the mantra texts are on standing height? (To be able to read the texts I had to look up, and the white texts were almost unreadable against the sky.) It would be great if one just could choose the preferred height (preferably by calibrating) and that the whole flow is then adjusted to that height:)

Update: every time I open yourhaven the taster starts as if it is the first time I'm opening the app. It would be nice if this is fixed:)

Other than that I already love the environments, the warm voices and the narratives.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your feedback! Adjusting the height is a feature we would love to implement in the future, thanks for sharing. We should get that bug fixed as well, I appreciate you reporting it - Claire, CEO YourHaven 💜

reviews.review_description: The fact that we can't at least choose whether to use our controllers as opposed to hand tracking is annoying. I spent way too much time trying to select options using hand tracking which i hate because it just doesn't work as well as the controllers.

developer_response.body:
[UPDATED]

From version v1.2.3 you can choose controllers or hand tracking. 

Thanks again for helping us make the app better! - Claire, CEO YourHaven 💜

reviews.review_title: A tool for training and recovery
reviews.review_description:
I've had the incredible opportunity to experience YourHaven for a long while now, thanks to early access through Meta's App Lab. Witnessing its transformation and continuous improvement has been awesome, a testament to the dedication of the developers and the entire team behind it. They've actively engaged with bug reports, feedback, and suggestions, consistently refining the application with each release (and squashing those bugs!).

Throughout my time using the app, I've acquired a whole new arsenal of meditation, relaxation, breathing, and self-awareness techniques. What's even more impressive is that these techniques have seamlessly integrated into my daily training and recovery routine, using the techniques I had learned inside the app, outside of the application in the real world. The breathing exercises, in particular, have become indispensable post-training tools, significantly enhancing my control over my body and heart rate in order to speed up my post-training recovery. 

Beyond its impact on my physical well-being, YourHaven has been a lifesaver during stressful days. It has this remarkable ability to help me unwind, shifting my focus from all the negatives and other worries, and instead help me focus on the positives, or at least make me feel optimistic and give me the confidence to tackle any issues I'm facing with a whole new energy. The result? A deeper, more restful sleep that I would have otherwise gone without and led me into a spiral of doom and frustration.

In summary, YourHaven goes beyond being just another virtual reality meditation and wellness application; it's a transformative tool. With patience and a commitment to the guided sessions, it has the potential to bring about real and meaningful changes in your life ❤️

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review. It really means a lot to us - as a team we've been putting in a lot of work this past year, and it's amazing to see you really understand what YourHaven is all about. For us, this isn't just about creating a meditation app, it's about making a fundamental difference to people's mental health and happiness.

Big thanks for sticking with us and for the feedback. It helps make sure we're always improving. And we hope you like all the new content we'll be dropping on a weekly basis!

Hope you keep loving the app. Here's to transforming more lives with YourHaven 💜

- Claire, CEO YourHaven.

reviews.review_description:
I am impressed by the quality of the app.
I am not a regular user of this kind of apps but I thought to give YourHaven a try. I was impressed by the graphics but most of all, the soothing and marvellous voices of the session curators. I can't wait to get some more sessions.
Good job to all the team!!!

developer_response.body:
We're thrilled to hear that YourHaven has made such a positive impression on you! We put a lot of thought and care into selecting our guides and designing our sessions, so your feedback is especially heartwarming. 

Stay tuned for more sessions — we're constantly working on bringing fresh and engaging content on a weekly basis! 

A big thank you from the entire team for giving YourHaven a try and for your encouraging words!  - Claire, CEO YourHaven 💜

reviews.review_description: An excellent application that dispels daily stress: a moment of complete relaxation where everything is forgotten. Its calming effect encourages daily return. While many seek therapists or use sedatives for better sleep, this application is more than sufficient to forget worries and aid in falling asleep

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind feedback! With YourHaven, we hope to improve people's lives daily. Just 5 to 10 minutes of YourHaven a day is enough to make a difference - Claire, CEO YourHaven 💜

reviews.review_description: Came back after a long stressful workday and decided to try this out. Completely taken aback by how immersive the app is! The sound effects are super soothing, the backgrounds are amazing and the visual effects are immensely helpful for someone whose attention span is normally too short to follow through these programmes!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much Josef! This means the world to us. We're committed to releasing new content on a weekly basis to ensure ongoing engagement for all our users. We deeply appreciate having you as a part of our journey - Claire, CEO YourHaven 💜

reviews.review_description:
I thought I’d give this app a try but it’s a little frustrating, or maybe it’s just not for me. 

I wish I didn’t have to stop to enable hand tracking every time I launched the app.  I don’t need hand tracking for a breath work/meditation app. 

Also, there doesn’t seem to be anyway to customize the meditations. For example, there’s no option to do them without narration or at least less taking. Having someone taking in my ear the whole time, while I’m trying to relax and breath is just a distraction and takes away from the experience.  There also doesn’t seem to be a way to chose the duration of the meditations. 

However the scenery for the meditations are absolutely gorgeous. Just wish I could quietly and silently enjoy them.

developer_response.body:
[Updated]

Thank you for trying out YourHaven and for sharing your feedback with us! We’re really glad you like our environments!


We loved your idea of a "quiet mode" so much that have already implemented it and it's available in our 1.2.1 release! Please check the narrator panel to select "Unguided mode" in one of the following sessions: 4-4 Breath, 3-4-7 Technique,  Humming Breath, 4-7-8 Technique or Simple Breathing (we will add more and more as we grow). 


Regarding the hand tracking feature, we introduced it to make the app more accessible and easier to navigate, especially for those who might be less familiar with controllers.


Having said this, we are actively working on supporting controllers as well. Hopefully from our next update. 


Please let us know when you try these new features! 


-Claire, CEO of YourHaven 💜

reviews.review_description: As a 77-year-old cancer survivor, I've faced my fair share of challenges. But I haven't yet found anything so impactful on my mental state during this process as YourHaven. One thing I particularly appreciate is the app's user-friendly interface. Even as someone who is no longer a spring chicken, I've had no trouble navigating through the different features and finding exactly what I need to support my mental state.  In short, YourHaven has been a bit of a beacon of hope for me. If you're looking for a way to improve your mental health and find moments of peace in you life, I can't recommend this app enough

developer_response.body:
Your message truly warms our hearts. It's incredibly inspiring to hear how YourHaven has become a beacon of hope for you, especially considering the challenges you've faced! We're so glad to know that you've had a great experience with the app so far! Your resilience and positive feedback is a huge motivation to us!  We'll keep improving and making our platform accessible and supportive for everyone.
Thank you for choosing YourHaven to accompany you on your path to peace and mental wellbeing. -Claire, CEO YourHaven 💜
